data.title:
The Winning Blueprint for
Enterprise Commerce
data.subtitle: An independent analysis of two architectures for enterprise commerce. Comparing VTEX and Salesforce Commerce Cloud across architecture, OMS, marketplace, scalability, and total cost of ownership.
bullets: See why the consolidated VTEX stack runs 30 to 50% below the Salesforce stack at the same enterprise scope
Find out which platform bundles OMS, marketplace, and B2B into one license, and which one stacks them as separate SKUs
Learn how multi-banner operators save admin hours with unified accounts versus separate Salesforce orgs per brand
Understand which enterprise capabilities come native and which require Mirakl, MuleSoft, and middleware to assemble
Get a clear framework for deciding between VTEX and Salesforce Commerce Cloud for your organization
data.authors: By Brent Peterson and Isaac Morey, Content Cucumber
data.form_subtitle: Free. No commitment. Straight to your inbox.
